steps.title: Substitute x = 7 into the function
steps.content:
We use the condition $f(7) = 28$ with the function $f(x) = 4x + b$:
$$4(7) + b = 28$$

steps.title: Simplify and solve for b
steps.content:
Simplifying the left side:
$$28 + b = 28$$
Subtracting \$28$ from both sides:
$$b = 0$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
